---
title: "Jeff Raker"
image: jeff_profile.jpeg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jeffrey-r-raker
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jraker01
---

Read the latest post on [**dérive: life adrift**](blog.qmd)
